productDisplayName: Lotto Men Caesar Cross Brown Sandals
description: This stylish pair of slide-ins from lotto makes a trendy statement combined with superior performance. It’s a great combination of enhanced cushioning and durability. These sandals give superior traction and protection to the feet, while remaining comfortable and stylish enough for casual wear. You can team these with linen pants and shirts for a refined look. Upper Criss crossing straps covering the midfoot and forefoot for better comfort and durability Stitch detailing for greater reinforcement and style Rounded toe box for more comfort Textile lining for greater comfort Rubber footbed with embossed branding Outsole TPU outsole with branded lugs Sandal care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth Do not machine wash
